title: JOB CONNECTION - 211info
text: KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job training, individualized career and life coaching, personal finance and life skills education, job placement, and work experience opportunities. Works with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Also provides job placement and support for ex-offenders in addition to a welfare to work program. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 887-8495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 887-8495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for an appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Basin Transit Service Mainline #1 bus stop located at S 6th and Owens Streets Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Ex-Offender Employment Programs Ex-Offender Reentry Programs Homeless Employment Programs Personal Financial Counseling Welfare to Work Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - JJ'S CONSTRUCTION THRIFT STORE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH WORKS
